observe: Not everything here is locked or open. Some things are counted — take one, and there's one less for the next person.
fault: The count hit zero and someone still reached for it. There's nothing left until someone gives one back.
repair: Hand the tokens out carefully. Watch the count as it moves.
escape: Keep the count honest — don't let it go negative.

observe: Semaphores use a count to control access to a limited number of resources.
fault: A resource was requested when the semaphore count reached zero.
repair: Allocate semaphore tokens to available resources.
escape: Complete all token allocations before time expires.

hints: Match each token to a slot one at a time — the count only allows so many out.
